roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: ARRAIGNMENT ON PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANTTO PC3000,08/PDP/WIAPTR/DEF: STIPULATES TO PROBABLE CAUASE/3000ADV/3000ADM/PAJ: 40 DAYS/X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR 9 DAYS,/4019HALF/X: VIOLATION #2 - ABSCONDING IS DISMISSED,/X: VIOLATION #3 - SECOND DEGREE BURGLARY IS DISMISSED,/X: COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO REINSTATE PAROLE AS OF 01-20-2015  WITHOUT ANY TIME LOSS,/X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPONRELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT/
